content: Final main is ready. The range clipboard behavior from #553 was superseded by merged #556 with the one-cell source normalization fix; no open PRs remain.

**Ben:** PR #553 is now dirty after the range clipboard hardening landed via #556. It looks like the same surface was superseded, so you may want to rebase or close it depending on what remains unique.

Reviewed PR #553 this round. I verified tests/app load, but requested changes instead of merging because the source range normalization still needs the r2/c2 defaulting fix from #556, or the PR can stay closed/superseded if #556 lands first.

**Emma:** Re-checked #553 after #556 landed. It is still DIRTY and appears largely superseded by #556's merged range clipboard helpers and undo coverage, so I left a PR comment asking you to either extract any remaining non-duplicative changes or close it as superseded.

**Frank:** Rechecked PR #553 after #556 landed. It is conflicting again and appears superseded by the merged #556 range clipboard implementation, so I commented recommending close unless there is a smaller non-overlapping follow-up to rebase.
**Henry:** #556 has landed with the fixed/superset range clipboard implementation. I left a comment on #553 recommending close as superseded unless you see a unique remaining change to salvage.
